description:
You are working as an integration-developer who is about to run a suite of smoke-tests against a staging API
    gateway located at https://sandbox.example.com/v2.  
    Two configuration files already exist inside the project directory
    /home/user/api-gateway/:

    1. /home/user/api-gateway/config.yaml  
       Current YAML snippet (for reference):  
           api:
             base_url: "https://dev.example.com/v1"
             timeout: 30
           logging:
             level: "info"

    2. /home/user/api-gateway/config.toml  
       Current TOML snippet (for reference):  
           [api]
           base_url = "https://dev.example.com/v1"
           timeout   = 30

           [logging]
           level = "info"

    The smoke tests require two changes to BOTH files:

       • Change the api base_url value from https://dev.example.com/v1  
         to https://sandbox.example.com/v2  
       • Change the logging level from "info" to "debug"

    After you finish editing the two files, create a plain-text verification file
    at /home/user/api-gateway/test_results/output.txt that contains EXACTLY the four
    lines shown below, in the same order and **with no extra whitespace or blank
    lines**:

        YAML_BASE_URL=https://sandbox.example.com/v2
        TOML_BASE_URL=https://sandbox.example.com/v2
        YAML_LOG_LEVEL=debug
        TOML_LOG_LEVEL=debug

    Notes & Rules:

    • Feel free to use any command-line tool you like (sed, awk, perl,
      ed, printf » …, nano + save via keystrokes, etc.).  
    • Do not hard-code additional keys; only update the existing keys and write the
      verification file.  
    • The directory /home/user/api-gateway/test_results/ already exists and is
      writable by your user.  
    • The automated grader will inspect:  
        – The final content of /home/user/api-gateway/config.yaml  
        – The final content of /home/user/api-gateway/config.toml  
        – The exact contents of /home/user/api-gateway/test_results/output.txt  
    • No other output format will be accepted.  
    • IMPORTANT: When you are done, make sure you have saved the files; unsaved
      changes inside an editor will cause the test to fail.
truth:

    /home/user/api-gateway/config.yaml (YAML):
        api:
          base_url: "https://dev.example.com/v1"
          timeout: 30
        logging:
          level: "info"

    /home/user/api-gateway/config.toml (TOML):
        [api]
        base_url = "https://dev.example.com/v1"
        timeout   = 30

        [logging]
        level = "info"

    /home/user/api-gateway/test_results/  exists and is empty.

    Expected file states AFTER correct task completion:

    /home/user/api-gateway/config.yaml:
        api:
          base_url: "https://sandbox.example.com/v2"
          timeout: 30
        logging:
          level: "debug"

    /home/user/api-gateway/config.toml:
        [api]
        base_url = "https://sandbox.example.com/v2"
        timeout   = 30

        [logging]
        level = "debug"

    /home/user/api-gateway/test_results/output.txt EXACT content:
        YAML_BASE_URL=https://sandbox.example.com/v2
        TOML_BASE_URL=https://sandbox.example.com/v2
        YAML_LOG_LEVEL=debug
        TOML_LOG_LEVEL=debug
